hero.title: Everything your pharmacy needs

quickSale.description: Fast checkout optimized for high-volume sales

scientificNames.description: Organize medicines by scientific and trade names

expiryManagement.title: Expiry Management

extraction.description: AI extracts products, prices, and quantities

review.title: Human Review

opening.title: Shift Opening and Closing

sales.title: Sales Reports
sales.description: Track sales by day, week, month, and year
